job_title: Software Engineer II - Back-end & ML/AI Infra
job_nlp_title: Software Engineer II - Back-end & ML/AI Infra
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
must_have_quals: 4 years of professional industry experience and BS or MS in Computer Science or a related technical discipline, or equivalent practical experience, Proficiency in at least one of Go, Java, Python, or C++, Solid understanding of algorithms, data structures, and software engineering fundamentals, At least five years of software engineering experience, Experience building or contributing to production backend or AI systems, Experience with GenAI, Model Context Protocol
preferred_quals: Experience developing backend or distributed systems such as microservices, APIs, or data-processing services, Familiarity with distributed systems concepts, including reliability, scalability, and performance trade-offs, Exposure to ML or AI systems, including model inference, data pipelines, or ML-enabled features, Interest or experience applying ML/AI techniques to security, privacy, or risk-related problems (e.g., data classification, PII detection, policy enforcement), Experience with system monitoring, observability, and production operations
core_responsibilities: Build user-facing products, handle and store thousands of transactions per second, and develop intelligent Privacy (Data Deletion) and Security (Access Control) strategies that scale, Work on design, development and maintenance of services, frameworks, and solutions to support user-facing products, downstream services, or infrastructure tools and platforms used across Uber, Design, implement and scale industry-leading privacy solutions for the entire company
job_summary: Uber is looking for a strong backend and AI Software Engineer II to join the Data Security & Governance engineering team within the Privacy, Security & Risk org. In this role, you will work on foundational platforms that protect Uber's data and AI ecosystem, collaborating with senior engineers to design and build reliable, scalable systems.
